claims.quote:
Orlando Health Is
Your Best Place to WorkJoin Our TeamSearch Careers
claims.claimText: Orlando Health careers landing page promoting job search and team membership.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page is the system-wide careers portal promoting employment opportunities, which is Tier 3 post-trainee career content.
claims.limitations: System-level careers portal; not campus-specific to ORMC.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.claimText: Careers page lists a dedicated 'Physician Opportunities' section/link.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: 'Physician Opportunities' is a physician-jobs entry point — Tier 3 attending/faculty career content.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Orlando Health Orlando Regional Medical Center
claims.claimText: ORMC is listed among the Orlando Health hospital sites with career opportunities.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: ORMC appears in the list of system hospitals advertising career opportunities — Tier 3 content tied to campus.
claims.limitations: Listed only as a campus name in a system-wide hospital list.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Credentialing Verification OfficeOverviewFAQsEducationOverviewContinuing Medical EducationGraduate Medical EducationRegistered Nurse Residency ProgramFor PhysiciansOverviewContinuing Medical EducationOverviewHB-21 HighlightsOpioid/Controlled Substance Education
claims.claimText: Navigation surfaces a Credentialing Verification Office and Continuing Medical Education program (including HB-21 and Opioid/Controlled Substance Education), indicating Tier 3 attending-physician services.
claims.limitations: Navigation-level signal; no eligibility or fee detail here.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 confined itself to residency/fellowship listings; attending-facing CME and credentialing services were not captured.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: CME and credentialing verification are post-trainee practicing-physician services — Tier 3.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family RESIDENCY_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: FOR NURSESFOR TEAM MEMBERSOrlando Health CareersMEDICAL PROFESSIONALSCLINICAL TRIALS & RESEARCH
claims.claimText: Page footer links to 'Orlando Health Careers', signaling a Tier 3 careers portal entry point.
claims.limitations: Footer link only; portal not captured.
claims.whyA1Missed: Footer navigation was not parsed for careers entry by A1.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Careers portal link is attending-physician employment surface — Tier 3.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family RESIDENCY_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.claimText: Careers portal advertises a 'Team Member Benefits' section for Orlando Health employees.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Team-member benefits content is Tier 3 attending/employee compensation/benefits content.
claims.limitations: System-wide benefits navigation entry; not campus-specific.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the page title and 'Physician Opportunities' but did not enumerate the benefits navigation entry.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.claimText: Careers portal references 'Hiring Events' as a recruitment channel.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Hiring events are an active recruiting mechanism for Tier 3 employment.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 missed the navigation sub-link enumerating hiring-events recruitment channel.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.claimText: Careers portal exposes a dedicated nursing-careers job search.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Distinct nursing-careers entry point; Tier 3 employment content (non-physician).
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured only the physician opportunities link, not the parallel nursing-careers entry.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.claimText: Careers portal exposes a 'Returning Applicants' login pathway for prior candidates.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Returning-applicant portal feature is a Tier 3 employment-application workflow.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 omitted the secondary application portal navigation link.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: with a footprint of care that spans from Florida's east to west coasts — and into Puerto Rico — you can find a great opportunity near you.
claims.claimText: Orlando Health employment footprint spans Florida east-to-west coast and includes Puerto Rico.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Geographic employment footprint is Tier 3 system-wide career context.
claims.limitations: System-wide footprint statement; ORMC is one campus within it.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not capture geographic-footprint marketing copy at the bottom of the page.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Orlando Health Watson Clinic Lakeland Highlands Hospital Careers
claims.claimText: Careers portal exposes a campus-specific careers entry for the Watson Clinic Lakeland Highlands Hospital site.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Campus-scoped careers link is Tier 3 employment routing.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not enumerate the parallel campus-specific careers links.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.claimText: Careers portal exposes a separate 'Baptist Health Careers' search, indicating an affiliated/partner careers track.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Affiliated-entity careers entry is Tier 3 employment routing.
claims.limitations: Baptist Health is an affiliated entity, not Orlando Health proper.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not enumerate the Baptist Health partner-careers link.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.claimText: Careers portal includes a dedicated 'Physicians at Orlando Health' overview section.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Physician-overview careers section is Tier 3 attending/faculty audience content.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured 'Physician Opportunities' link but missed the parallel 'Physicians at Orlando Health' overview tab.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only
